# Light Speed Ghost

> The AI academic writing and publishing platform built for students and creators. Eight dedicated tools. Real peer-reviewed citations. No Wikipedia.

## What it is

Light Speed Ghost (lightspeedghost.com) is an AI-powered academic writing and publishing platform for college and university students. It combines eight specialized tools in one platform: AI paper writing, outline generation, paper revision, LightSpeed Humanizer (AI text rewriting), AI and plagiarism detection, STEM problem solving, a long-term memory AI study assistant, and an AI ebook writer for publishing to Amazon KDP and 40+ platforms.

It is available at https://lightspeedghost.com and works in any modern browser with no installation required. Also available as a PWA (installable on iOS, Android, and desktop).

## Who it is for

- Undergraduate and postgraduate students at any university worldwide
- Students writing essays, research papers, lab reports, literature reviews, dissertations, and theses
- Students in STEM subjects who need step-by-step homework help with equations and graphs
- Anyone checking their work for AI content or plagiarism before submission
- Students who want a personalized AI tutor that remembers their learning history
- Authors and content creators publishing ebooks to Amazon KDP, Apple Books, and other platforms
- Business professionals creating ebooks for lead generation or thought leadership

## The eight tools

### 1. AI Paper Writer
Generates full academic papers grounded in 15 live academic databases (1B+ papers): OpenAlex, CrossRef, PubMed NCBI, Semantic Scholar, ERIC (US Dept of Education), Zenodo (CERN), arXiv, CORE, DOAJ, Europe PMC, BASE, DataCite, OpenAIRE, Sci-Net, and Unpaywall. Results are ranked by citation count. No Wikipedia. No hallucinated citations.

Supports all major citation formats: APA 7th, MLA 9th, Chicago, Harvard, IEEE.
Upload an assignment rubric PDF to automatically extract A-grade criteria and lock them as paper requirements before generation starts.
A plagiarism gate enforces below 8% cosine similarity before delivery.
Available at: https://lightspeedghost.com/write

### 2. LightSpeed Humanizer
Rewrites AI-generated text to read as human-authored. Runs a real AI detection scan first, then rewrites with varied sentence rhythm, natural academic hedging, and authentic voice. Targets below 5% AI detection score. Tone options: academic, conversational, professional.
Available at: https://lightspeedghost.com/humanizer

### 3. Outline Builder
Generates a structured hierarchical outline (Roman numeral / lettered sub-points) for any paper topic and subject. Upload a brief or describe the assignment — output in seconds.
Available at: https://lightspeedghost.com/outline

### 4. Paper Revision
Takes a student's existing draft and revises it toward a target grade (e.g. First, A, Distinction). Upload a grading rubric to align every revision with assessed criteria. Explains every change so students learn from it.
Available at: https://lightspeedghost.com/revision

### 5. AI and Plagiarism Checker
Detects AI-generated content patterns using lexical diversity analysis. Detects plagiarism using cosine similarity against academic sources. Highlights flagged sections.
Available at: https://lightspeedghost.com/plagiarism

### 6. STEM Solver
Accepts typed problems, pasted text, or photographs of homework sheets (OCR-powered). Returns step-by-step worked solutions with KaTeX-rendered equations, data visualizations, molecule diagrams (Chemistry), and linked research papers. Supports: Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Computer Science, Engineering, Statistics.
Available at: https://lightspeedghost.com/stem

### 7. AI Study Assistant
A conversational AI tutor with persistent long-term memory. Builds a per-student profile of strengths, struggles, and past topics across every session. Supports file upload (PDF, DOCX, images) for lecture notes or textbook excerpts as context.
Available at: https://lightspeedghost.com/study

### 8. AI Ebook Writer
Writes professional ebooks from 8,000 to 25,000 words (5–12 chapters) for publication on Amazon KDP, Apple Books, Google Play Books, Kobo Writing Life, Barnes & Noble Press, Draft2Digital, IngramSpark, and 40+ platforms. Grounded in verified academic and industry sources (Harvard Business Review, McKinsey Global Institute, MIT Sloan Management Review, and 10+ databases). Each chapter opens with a curated expert quote (Warren Buffett, Simon Sinek, etc.). Output includes a full Amazon KDP publishing guide with title, subtitle, description, keywords, and category paths ready to paste. Supports 15+ languages. 15 ebooks per month.
Available at: https://lightspeedghost.com/ebooks

## Academic database coverage

15 live databases queried simultaneously on every paper request, with results ranked by citation count:
- OpenAlex (250M+ papers, 50,000+ publishers)
- CrossRef (150M+ DOI-registered works)
- PubMed NCBI (36M+ biomedical papers)
- Semantic Scholar (200M+ papers — Allen Institute)
- ERIC (2M+ education research papers — US Department of Education)
- Zenodo (3M+ DOI-assigned records — CERN open science)
- arXiv (2M+ preprints — Physics, Mathematics, CS)
- CORE (200M+ open access papers)
- DOAJ (20,000+ peer-reviewed open access journals)
- Europe PMC (40M+ biomedical papers)
- BASE (300M+ documents from 10,000+ sources)
- DataCite (45M+ research outputs)
- OpenAIRE (100M+ research products)
- Sci-Net (peer-reviewed research network)
- Unpaywall (50M+ open access full-text papers)

Total coverage: 1B+ papers. Wikipedia is excluded. All sources require DOI or verifiable URL.

## Pricing (as of 2026)

- **Starter**: $9.99/month — 3 papers/month, 5 outlines, 5 plagiarism + AI checks, 15 STEM queries/month, 20 study messages/month, 1 revision
- **Pro Monthly**: $29.99/month — 15 papers/month, 20 revisions, 60 STEM solves/month, 150 study sessions/month, 20 plagiarism + AI checks/month, LightSpeed Humanizer (20 jobs/month), priority AI processing
- **Pro Annual**: $269/year ($22.42/month) — same as Pro Monthly, save 25%
- **Institution**: $9/seat/month billed annually — minimum 5 seats, admin dashboard, shared document library
- **Ebooks Add-On**: $29.99/month — 15 AI ebooks/month, Amazon KDP + 40+ platforms, separate from academic plans
- **Pay-As-You-Go**: from $3.99 per task (discussion post) to $59.99 (dissertation). Credits never expire.
